meta.title: Skyscraper Farming
meta.sourceDoc: 47. P2 - Skyscraper Farming 摩天大楼种植.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Skyscraper Farming 摩天大楼种植

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：vii
PDF 定位/解析：A段整段都在说耕地肥力迅速下降、可耕新地越来越"sparse"，24%耕地已退化一集中描写"日益严重 的全球农业难题"。

题目 15
答案：ix
PDF 定位/解析：havetogoupby7opercent"直接聚焦"对粮食需求激增"。

题目 16
答案：i
PDF 定位/解析：C段提出高层垂直农场理念，并给出"couldboostcropyieldsmanytimesover...asingle20-storey verticalfarmcouldtheoreticallyfeed50000people"等产量估算。

题目 17
答案：iii
PDF 定位/解析：D段介绍日本HokutoCorporation已运营28座垂直蘑菇农场，年产6800o吨，说明"成功实践" 与盈利模式。

题目 18
答案：iv
PDF 定位/解析：E段强调可将模块化温室做成"mobileunitsthatcouldbepickedupbyhelicoptersanddroppedintothe middleofacrisiszone"，突出紧急人道救援。

题目 19
答案：vi
PDF 定位/解析：F段先批评传统农业破坏森林，再列举垂直农业可"returnlandtoitsoriginalecologicalfunction"、减少化 石燃料使用、缓解地缘冲突等多重环保收益。

questionSections.text:
题目 20
答案：erosion
PDF 定位/解析：A段末句"..soil degradation,particularly through erosion, according to a recent studyby the UK Government Office for Science."

题目 21
答案：operating costs
PDF 定位/解析：D段引语"initialinvestmentandoperatingcoststhataretoogreat"。题干已含setupexpense，另一缺点即高operatingcosts。

题目 22
答案：helicopters
PDF 定位/解析：E段"mobile units that could be picked up by helicopters and dropped into the middle of a crisis zone."

items.text:
题目 20
答案：erosion
PDF 定位/解析：A段末句"..soil degradation,particularly through erosion, according to a recent studyby the UK Government Office for Science."

题目 21
答案：operating costs
PDF 定位/解析：D段引语"initialinvestmentandoperatingcoststhataretoogreat"。题干已含setupexpense，另一缺点即高operatingcosts。

题目 22
答案：helicopters
PDF 定位/解析：E段"mobile units that could be picked up by helicopters and dropped into the middle of a crisis zone."

questionSections.text:
题目 23
答案：B
PDF 定位/解析：D段"highlights therelativecost-effectivenessofits organisation's farmingpractices"→说明垂直农场"有经济收益"。

题目 24
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：F段开头Despommier指出传统农业在短时间内对景观造成"harm"，如森林被砍伐一一负面影响。

题目 25
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：C段Despommier估算一座20层农场可养活50000人，多座可养活整个纽约，说明可"极大提高全球粮食产量"。

题目 26
答案：C
PDF 定位/解析：F段末"Reducing the land needed for food production could enrich biodiversity, which in turn can raise the productivityofconventionalfarms"→传统农场可因垂直农场而受益。
